summary: 2026-06-06 07:38:48 PDT - Re-reviewed `git diff 58a02ff...HEAD`, `git log --oneline 58a02ff..HEAD`, and `reviews/harden-merge-and-guard.md`. The new delta directly addresses the prior blocker by blocking `--force-with-lease=<...>` value forms and adding matching fixtures. Targeted hook payloads for both new value forms exit 2, and `git diff --check` is clean. The full guard test cannot run in this read-only sandbox because `mktemp` cannot create its temp repos, but that is environmental rather than a diff issue.
